items.title: Xiaomi says Sky Nomad is a series, not a new brand, teases SUV
items.summary: Xiaomi has answered the biggest open question about Sky Nomad: it's a second product series under Xiaomi EV, not the standalone sub-brand that had been rumored for months. The company also revealed the first clear look at the lineup's...

items.title: AMD's upcoming Zen 6 Medusa Point 10-core APU pops up on Geekbench - chip is faster than Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 & even Ryzen AI Max+ 395

items.title: Elon Musk receives FTC greenlight to buy Mesh Optical as interconnects emerge as AI's tightest bottleneck - the move will expand Musk's growing stack of critical AI infrastructure
items.summary: FTC clearance to acquire Mesh Optical hands Musk the missing layer between Terafab's chips and Gigasat's satellites, amid tightening interconnect AI bottleneck

items.title: DuckDuckGo Browser Now Blocks YouTube Ads on iPhone and Mac

items.title: Can I Set the Maximum Distance the Beacon Transmits?
